visual_description: Two men sit in the dim interior of a car; the man on the left, wearing a black shirt, has sweat on his face and leans forward with his mouth open while his hand rests on the other man's shoulder. The man on the right, with dark hair and a goatee and wearing a black leather jacket, looks at him with a focused expression. The camera alternates between close-ups of each man's face.
audio_description: A tense spoken exchange is audible, with one man speaking and the other listening quietly.
